name: BrickPulse
description: BrickPulse is a browser-based implementation of the classic Breakout arcade game, built entirely with vanilla TypeScript and no production dependencies. The player controls a horizontal paddle at the bottom of the game board using the left and right arrow keys. A ball bounces continuously across the board, and the objective is to use the paddle to keep the ball in play while it collides with and destroys a grid of 18 blocks arranged in three rows at the top of the board.
